In sports, the player judged to be the most important to the team is the most valuable player (MVP).

It was donated to the NHL by the Montreal Canadiens in and is named in honour of legendary Montreal Canadiens right winger Maurice "Rocket" Richard. It was first won by Teemu Selanne. The current holder is Sidney Crosby of the Pittsburgh Penguins, who scored 44 goals during the season.
